title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: DELTA OAKS CLINIC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 1022 Green Acres Road Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Individuals with a income below 250% FPL, menopausal individuals and individuals with OHP do not qualify for the Reproductive Health Program. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 682-3550 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-3550 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: LTD bus routes 66 and 67 Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DELTA OAKS CLINIC
